title: Add proxy URL validation and .onion warning
description:
In main.rs, after resolving the proxy and relay URLs, validate that the proxy URL scheme is socks5:// or socks5h://; emit warn!() if relay is .onion without socks5h proxy.

## What
Early validation that emits a clear error for invalid proxy schemes and a warning when .onion relay is used without socks5h proxy.

## Algorithm
1. After proxy resolution (proxy = cli.proxy.or(file_config.proxy)) in main.rs:
   a. If proxy is Some(ref p):
      - Parse p with url::Url::parse(p).with_context(|| 'invalid proxy URL')?
      - If scheme is not 'socks5' and not 'socks5h': bail!('proxy URL must start with socks5:// or socks5h://')
      - If relay URL ends with '.onion' and scheme == 'socks5' (not socks5h): warn!('relay is .onion but proxy scheme is socks5:// — DNS will be resolved locally before Tor tunnel; use socks5h:// to prevent DNS leak')
   b. If proxy is None and relay URL ends with '.onion':
      - warn!('.onion relay address without a SOCKS5 proxy — connection will likely fail without Tor; use --proxy socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050')
2. Do not hard-error on .onion without proxy — just warn. (User may have system-wide Tor routing)

## Defensive programming rules
- Url::parse errors must include the offending URL in the error context (but NOT if it might contain credentials — since this is validation, use only scheme+host+port in any error message)
- The warn!() calls must use tracing::warn!, not eprintln!
- Never bail! on .onion without proxy — only warn
- bail! is correct for invalid scheme (we cannot proceed without a valid proxy URL format)

## Agent team
Researcher (read main.rs validation block + tracing usage), Implementer, Validator

## Tests
- invalid_scheme: --proxy http://localhost:3128 → process exits with 'must start with socks5://'
- valid_socks5: --proxy socks5://127.0.0.1:1080 → no error (even if proxy unreachable at this point)
- valid_socks5h: --proxy socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050 → no error
- onion_no_proxy: --relay ws://abc.onion/ws (no --proxy) → warn! message in output, no exit error
- onion_with_socks5: --relay ws://abc.onion/ws --proxy socks5://127.0.0.1:9050 → warn! about DNS leak
- onion_with_socks5h: --relay ws://abc.onion/ws --proxy socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050 → no warning
Acceptance: cargo test -p nie-cli exits 0; all six test cases pass; clippy exits 0.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-cli exits 0; invalid proxy scheme returns clear error; .onion warnings emitted correctly; clippy exits 0
